title: About this question
description: Complete the total supplement deductions section of your supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, TaxPack supplement, deductions, supplement deductions

rows: Did you claim any deductions at items D11 to D15?

content_blocks.text: Add up all the deduction amounts in the right-hand column of items D11 to D15 on your tax return.
Write the amount from step 1 at Total supplement deductions on page 15 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement deductions to D on page 15 of your tax return.
Go to Total deductions to calculate your total deductions. Then work through the Losses section .

rows: Where to go next go to question T7 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse return to main menu Tax return for individuals instructions go back to question D15 Other deductions .

content_text:
Did you claim any deductions at items D11 to D15?
No | Go to step 4, or
Yes | Go to step 1.
### Step 1
Add up all the deduction amounts in the right-hand column of items D11 to D15 on your tax return.
### Step 2
Write the amount from step 1 at Total supplement deductions on page 15 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
### Step 3
Transfer the amount you wrote at Total supplement deductions to D on page 15 of your tax return.
### Step 4
Go to Total deductions to calculate your total deductions. Then work through the Losses section .
Where to go next go to question T7 Superannuation contributions on behalf of your spouse return to main menu Tax return for individuals instructions go back to question D15 Other deductions .
